overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, taking off from an industrial alley and flying through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey passes towering skyscrapers, massive holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture with heavy neon signage.

events.description: vehicle lifts off from ground and begins ascending rapidly
transition from ground level to aerial view of cityscape

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle upward from an industrial alley into the night sky, leaving the graffiti-covered building behind

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with large white MEN graffiti on the wall
large green industrial dumpster visible on the ground
dark asphalt street visible below the vehicle
futuristic vehicle interior with green ambient lighting and illuminated control panels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at ground level in an industrial alley with a graffiti-covered building and dumpster visible. The vehicle lifts off and ascends, revealing the sprawling neon-lit city below as the camera gains altitude.

events.description: accelerating forward over the illuminated city grid

agents.ego_description: flying forward over the city streets at moderate altitude, navigating between lower buildings while gaining speed

entered.detail: illuminated grid of city streets and intersections visible below
cluster of lower commercial buildings with lit windows
traffic signals visible at intersections below

segments.scene_description: Flying over the urban grid at moderate altitude, the view shows the illuminated street layout below with scattered low-rise buildings. The industrial area falls behind as the vehicle accelerates toward the dense downtown skyline.

events.description: flying close past the building marked with 05 signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense skyscraper canyon, banking slightly as passing close to the building marked 05

entered.detail: tall dark building with large illuminated 05 signage on the facade
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows
elevated roadway structure with moving traffic visible below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the dense downtown canyon, flying between towering skyscrapers. The building marked with 05 dominates the right side as the vehicle passes close to it, while glass office towers line the left and an elevated highway runs below.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive holographic advertising

events.description: approaching massive holographic face billboard that dominates the forward view
flying directly past the giant holographic billboard with pink neon face

agents.ego_description: flying toward and past a massive holographic advertisement displaying a human face in bright pink and blue neon

entered.detail: giant holographic display showing a human face in vibrant pink and cyan neon colors
tall buildings covered in vertical neon advertisements and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a massive holographic billboard displaying a giant neon face that fills the forward view. After passing closely by the advertisement, the scene opens into a canyon of buildings covered in vertical neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit commercial canyon with heavy advertising

events.description: entering area with densest concentration of neon signage and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: continuing flight through the neon canyon, surrounded by vertical holographic advertisements and illuminated skyscrapers on both sides

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated billboards and neon signs covering building facades
bridge with bright lighting spanning across the view in the distance

segments.scene_description: Flying through the densest part of the neon district, the vehicle is surrounded by walls of illuminated advertisements and holographic displays. An illuminated bridge structure appears in the distance as the flight continues through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a gritty industrial alley into the heart of a luminous, high-tech metropolis. It begins at ground level beside a graffiti-covered building and a dumpster, lifting off to reveal the sprawling neon-lit urban grid as the vehicle gains altitude. As the industrial area falls behind, the camera accelerates toward the downtown skyline, transitioning from open air into a dense canyon of towering skyscrapers and glass office towers. The flight then passes closely by a massive holographic billboard of a giant neon face before opening into a corridor of buildings draped in vertical signage. Finally, the vehicle pushes through the densest part of the neon district, surrounded by walls of holographic displays, as an illuminated bridge structure emerges in the distance.
